subject: move non-root id run for CDT container
commit_message:
move non-root id run for CDT container

change port 80 to 18080 for non-root user

Change-Id: Ib1e987b6aaf537df4d1b08797b928aa0b116fab0
Issue-ID: APPC-1519
Signed-off-by: Taka Cho <takamune.cho@att.com>

good reflex :)
last night (CET), there was an upgrade on our internal gitlab infra leading to some problems on most of our runners
the installation failed due to shortage of resources
we are currently unlocking/restarting some stuff, it should be back soon - good occasion to test the deployment on demand based on a gerrit magic word

hello, I think I need this merge as soon as possible. let me know when we can merge this. thanks -Taka

Patch Set 4: Code-Review+1

based on the CD results we can merge this after a 2nd developer review (oom or on the appc side ) also we should not rely solely on the CD system - the developer needs to post healthcheck and kubectl get pods --all-namespaces results - see https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+Meeting+Notes+-+2019-03-13
